summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CMS-driven marketing website for MyRent/SyncBeds. All core CMS functionality is working correctly including admin login, page editor, section management, and content saving.

design_issues.description: Console warning about dragListeners prop not being recognized - should be lowercase draglisteners
Console warning about duplicate 'link' extension names in rich text editor

passed_tests: Page retrieval and creation via API
CMS login functionality via footer link
Page Editor opens correctly when logged in
Adding Hero Section to home page
Custom HTML section max_width control (100%, 700px, etc.)
Custom HTML section alignment control (center, left, right)
WYSIWYG Editor and Raw HTML/SVG toggle
